issues.description: No privacy policy link detected
issues.remediation: Add a clearly visible link to your privacy policy on every page, typically in the footer.

issues.description: Cookie "_gcl_au" is missing the Secure flag
issues.remediation: Set the Secure attribute on the "_gcl_au" cookie so it is only transmitted over HTTPS.

issues.description: Cookie "SearchVisitorId" is missing the HttpOnly flag
issues.remediation: Set the HttpOnly attribute on the "SearchVisitorId" cookie to prevent JavaScript access and reduce XSS risk.

issues.description: Cookie "_ga" has a lifetime exceeding 1 year (expires 2027-07-20)
issues.remediation: Reduce the expiry of the "_ga" cookie to 12 months or less as required by GDPR data minimisation principles.

issues.description: Missing Permissions-Policy header
issues.remediation: Add a Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser feature access (e.g. "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()") and reduce the attack surface.

issues.description: Missing Permissions-Policy header
issues.remediation: Add a Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser feature access (e.g. "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()") and reduce the attack surface.

issues.description: Missing Referrer-Policy header
issues.remediation: Add a Referrer-Policy header (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin") to control how much referrer information is sent with requests.

issues.description: Missing Referrer-Policy header
issues.remediation: Add a Referrer-Policy header (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin") to control how much referrer information is sent with requests.
